recentArticles.title: Anson Lo on Mirror, Acting Ambitions and Hong Kong Pop's Rise - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: As a singer, he says, “I would just be myself, sing however I want, dance however I want – it’s about being my true self.” Acting, by contrast, demands the opposite. I feel very interested in those kinds of things, and I think it’s important to raise awareness to mental development, and also the mental illness that we’re in.” He situates the impulse in something local and immediate: “As a Hong Kong person myself, Hong Kong people feel very stressed every single day.”. “Much more different variations of different genres of singers have debuted throughout these years, and I think it is easier for Hong Kong people to have their pick.” He acknowledges the competitive landscape directly – noting that Hong Kong audiences have long gravitated toward K-pop and American pop – and frames the local scene’s growth as a question of offering comparable variety.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Anson Lo對歌唱、演戲、心理健康及香港流行音樂發展的看法，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Chinese Auteur Jia Zhangke Wraps Short Film in Italy, Talks AI at Asian Film Awards Masterclass - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Chinese Auteur Jia Zhangke Wraps Short Film in Italy, Talks AI at Asian Film Awards Masterclass. Chinese auteur Jia Zhangke has finished shooting a short film in Italy, commissioned and produced by Carlo Chatrian, director of the National Museum of Cinema in Turin. “My latest short film was my first experience of shooting in Italy,” said Jia. I have witnessed the transition from films to digital production,” said Jia. In a languid session reminiscent of one of his films, Jia took the audience through a multitude of topics, from the difficulties of accessing foreign films during his childhood and student life, through the start of his eventual career-long collaboration with Hong Kong DP Yu Lik-wai, best practices as a film director and the process of looking for investment. Here is an elderly person who runs in the morning for the sake of filmmaking,” Jia said. In response to questions from the youthful Asian Film Awards Academy audience, Jia also offered a glimpse into his scripting process.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要關於導演賈樟柯在義大利拍攝短片並討論AI與電影製作，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jackie Chan, Leo Zhang Team for Action Comedy ‘Pawfect Agents,’ Cappu Films Handling Sales (EXCLUSIVE) - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackie Chan, Leo Zhang Team for Action Comedy ‘Pawfect Agents,’ Cappu Films Handling Sales (EXCLUSIVE). Jackie Chan and director Leo Zhang have teamed for “Pawfect Agents,” an action comedy set to begin production in September, with international sales company Cappu Films handling pre-sales and introducing the project to buyers at Hong Kong FilMart. The live-action and CG hybrid feature is directed and produced by Zhang, whose previous credits include “Fox Hunt” and “Bleeding Steel.” LinKEY Sanxing Film and Zhang’s Shangjia Film are key partners in the project’s development and production. Unlike many of his classic films, where he teams up with human partners, this time his allies are a group of animal agents brought to life through a blend of live-action and CG,” Zhang said. “The project represents a rare cultural and technological exchange between some of Europe’s most admired heritage sites and a Chinese film production, allowing the film to capture the grandeur of iconic scenery while introducing a lively new adventure that we believe will resonate strongly with audiences worldwide.”.
recentArticles.summary: Jackie Chan, Leo Zhang Team for Action Comedy ‘Pawfect Agents,’ Cappu Films Handling Sales (EXCLUSIVE) - Variety

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Plots Pair of Yankee Stadium Shows for ‘Reasonable Doubt’ and ‘The Blueprint’ Anniversaries - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z Plots Pair of Yankee Stadium Shows for ‘Reasonable Doubt’ and ‘The Blueprint’ Anniversaries. Jay-Z is set to celebrate the anniversaries of his seminal albums *Reasonable Doubt* and *The Blueprint* with a pair of concerts at Yankee Stadium in New York this summer, the rapper’s company Roc Nation confirmed on Wednesday. The first show celebrates the 30th anniversary of Jay’s debut album *Reasonable Doubt* and will take place on Friday, July 10, and the second show is set for the following day, July 11, and commemorates the 25th anniversary of *The Blueprint.* Both records are considered among the greatest rap albums of all time, earning platinum certifications from the RIAA. The news comes a day after Jay-Z was confirmed to headline the upcoming Roots Picnic in Philadelphia in May. Public performances from Jay-Z have become rarer in recent years, and he hasn’t had a full solo tour since his 4:44 Tour back in 2017.
recentArticles.summary: Jay-Z Plots Pair of Yankee Stadium Shows for ‘Reasonable Doubt’ and ‘The Blueprint’ Anniversaries - The Hollywood Reporter

recentArticles.title: Corporate debt downgrades and $4 trillion pension shortfall loom over U.S. markets - KITCO
recentArticles.snippet: Kitco NEWS has a diverse team of journalists reporting on the economy, stock markets, commodities, cryptocurrencies, mining and metals with accuracy and objectivity. Jeremy Szafron joins Kitco News as an anchor and producer from Kitco’s Vancouver bureau. Jeremy began his career in 2006 as a Journalist at CTV (Canada’s largest network), initially engaging audiences as an entertainment reporter before pivoting to business reporting focusing on mining and small-caps. Building on this experience, Jeremy developed an online video news program for PressReader, launching them into a new direction. Following this success, he launched Investor Scene and Initiate Research, news platforms providing exclusive market insights and deal-flow opportunities in mining and Canadian small-caps. Jeremy has also worked as a market strategist and investor relations consultant with various publicly traded companies in the mining, energy, CPG, and tech industries. Now, as an Anchor at Kitco News, Jeremy will continue to inform a global audience of the latest developments and critical themes in finance and commodities.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Kitco News新主播Jeremy Szafron的職業背景及其報導領域，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Bruno Mars Inks Publishing Deal With Avex Music Group - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # Bruno Mars Inks Publishing Deal With Avex Music Group. Bruno Mars has entered into a publishing deal with Avex Music Group, the company announced Tuesday, putting the Japanese company in business with one of the biggest hitmakers in the music industry. “Bruno Mars is one of the most culturally impactful songwriters of his generation,” Katsumi Kuroiwa, CEO of Avex Inc, said in a statement. ### Bruno Mars Brings the Love With Grammy Performance of New Single 'I Just Might'](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/music/music-news/bruno-mars-2026-grammys-performance-1236490000/). Mars is one of the most successful songwriters in the history of the music business, with 10 No. 1s on Billboard’s Hot 100 including one earlier this year for his single “I Just Might” from his latest album *The Romantic* and another last year with global smash duet “Die With A Smile” with Lady Gaga. “We are thrilled to welcome Bruno to Avex and look forward to supporting his incredible songs,” Avex Music Group CEO Brandon Silverstein said on Tuesday.

recentArticles.title: What Zohran Mamdani's favorite rappers shows about his politics - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: ## Mamdani chooses uber-capitalists Biggie, Nas and Jay-Z among his five favorite rappers. While New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani may not agree with the Democratic Party’s centrist wing on much, he does have mainstream taste in hip hop. And the new mayor's choices were almost as unsurprising: four widely revered legends who rose to fame in the 1990s − Nas, Common, Jay-Z, and the Notorious B.I.G., better known as Biggie − and one almost as prominent from the 2000s, Lupe Fiasco. For example, the moderate House Democratic Leader Rep. Hakeem Jeffries put three of the same rappers − Biggie, Jay-Z and Nas − in his top own top five when asked for his list in 2020. It's not a coincidence that Mamdani and Jeffries both chose Nas, Biggie and Jay-Z. Admiring Common is not the only thing Mamdani has in common with the former president, who also famously enjoyed listening to Jay-Z — or maybe Mamdani was never really as edgy and radical as both his supporters and opponents imagined in the first place.
recentArticles.summary: What Zohran Mamdani's favorite rappers shows about his politics - USA Today

recentArticles.title: Money matters in practice - Nature
recentArticles.snippet: **Rhiannon Jones** spoke with Jay Dhaliwal, an independent chartered financial planner, about how dental hygienists and dental therapists can build financial confidence and protect themselves both professionally and personally. In the most recent British Society of Dental Hygiene and Therapy (BSDHT) *Dental Health Matters* podcast, Rhiannon Jones and Jay Dhaliwal explored why understanding protection, planning and personal finances matters throughout a clinical career. Jay clarified that professional protection on its own does not address the realities of how many dental hygienists and dental therapists work. For those who are self-employed, work across several practices or rely on limited employer benefits (such as the NHS), personal financial planning often determines how resilient a career really is when circumstances change. Rather than presenting financial planning as a structured checklist, Jay framed it as a way for clinicians to make informed choices in careers that are rarely linear. Jay Dhaliwal is an independent chartered financial planner at Chase De Vere with 10 years' experience supporting dental professionals.
recentArticles.summary: Money matters in practice - Nature

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Is Playing Yankee Stadium This Summer: Who Are the Biggest Acts to Ever Play There? - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z Is Playing Yankee Stadium This Summer: Who Are the Biggest Acts to Ever Play There? In advance of his two July dates, *Billboard* looks at the biggest Yankee Stadium shows in Boxscore history. Jay-Z announced on Wednesday (March 18) his first two headline concerts in seven years with shows at Yankee Stadium on July 10-11. ### Jay-Z Announces Two Yankee Stadium Shows Celebrating ‘Reasonable Doubt’ & ‘The Blueprint’ Anniversaries. Jay-Z “made the Yankee hat more famous than a Yankee can,” as he famously rapped in 2009’s “Empire State of Mind,” but it’s been even longer since he played at the iconic stadium. Before that, he did a hometown swap with Eminem, playing two shows at Detroit’s Comerica Park and two at Yankee Stadium in 2010. The earliest Yankee Stadium concert reported to Billboard Boxscore featured Tracy Chapman headlining a rally to celebrate Nelson Mandela’s release from prison in 1990. Keep reading for the five biggest Boxscore reports from Yankee Stadium, by the numbers.
recentArticles.summary: Jay-Z Is Playing Yankee Stadium This Summer: Who Are the Biggest Acts to Ever Play There? - Billboard

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z to Celebrate ‘Reasonable Doubt’ and ‘The Blueprint’ Anniversaries With Back-to-Back Yankee Stadium Concerts - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z to Celebrate ‘Reasonable Doubt’ and ‘The Blueprint’ Anniversaries With Back-to-Back Yankee Stadium Concerts. Jay-Z is planning to celebrate the anniversaries of two of his most celebrated albums — “Reasonable Doubt” and “The Blueprint” — with back-to-back concerts at Yankee Stadium this summer. At Roots Picnic 2026, taking place from May 30-31, Jay-Z will perform alongside the Roots, marking the first time they’ve played together in over a decade. Jay-Z has been on something of a promotional rollout for the anniversaries after fans noticed that his name had been changed to JAŸ-Z on streaming services, calling back to the stylization he used for “Reasonable Doubt.” In the past few weeks, he put the original version of “Dead Presidents” on streaming and dropped the video for “Wishing on a Star” featuring Gwen Dickey on YouTube. ## More from Variety. * ### ‘Reminders of Him’ Review: The Latest Colleen Hoover Movie Is a Pleasingly Restrained Weeper About the Passion of Motherhood.

recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Reveals Self-Titled Album Will Arrive This Spring. The Grammy Award winner's fifth studio LP will be released on their birthday, April 24. Kehlani officially announced the release of their highly-anticipated studio album, *Kehlani,* which is set to arrive April 24 via Atlantic Records. Ending the message with “k5,” Kehlani subtly nodded to the project’s place as their fifth studio album overall. The upcoming LP also signals a new chapter following their 2024 album, *Crash,* which featured the Grammy-nominated single “After Hours.”. Demand for new music from Kehlani has been fueled by their 2025 single “Folded.”. Produced by D’Mile, the popular slow-burner was hailed as one of the year’s defining hits, earning the singer a Grammy Award for Best R&B Performance. ### BTS to Deliver First U.S. Performance in Nearly 4 Years at Fan Event for New Album. * ### Jokes Aside, Jack Harlow’s New Album Is Not Half Bad.

recentArticles.title: Shatta Wale Taps John Legend for Genre-Fusing ‘Ain’t Nobody’ Collaboration: Stream It Now - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Shatta Wale Taps John Legend for Genre-Fusing ‘Ain’t Nobody’ Collaboration: Stream It Now. Reggae meets R&B on this groovy new track. On Friday, Ghanaian megastar Shatta Wale shared his new “Ain’t Nobody” single, which features EGOT-winning global R&B icon John Legend. “Gyal you are mi happiness/ Still mi love your snappiness/ You the girl weh me wanted to know me when no one else/ Making love to you and you say boy mi love your scrappiness,” Shatta sing-chats in a ’90s reggae cadence over a soulful mélange of guitars and brass, before Legend chimes in with his buttery vocals in the soaring chorus. Written by both artists alongside Rob Murat, who co-produced the song with Sean Kantrowitz, “Ain’t Nobody” bridges reggae and R&B by relying on the genre’s shared muses of love and relationships. “Ain’t Nobody” also marks Legend’s second new collaboration of 2026.
recentArticles.summary: Shatta Wale Taps John Legend for Genre-Fusing ‘Ain’t Nobody’ Collaboration: Stream It Now - Billboard

recentArticles.title: Justin Timberlake’s DWI Arrest Footage Released: ‘I’m a Little Nervous… My Heart Is Racing’ - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Timberlake’s DWI Arrest Footage Released: ‘I’m a Little Nervous… My Heart Is Racing’. Footage of Justin Timberlake’s 2024 DWI arrest has been released after the singer sued Sag Harbor Village earlier this month to prevent it from seeing the light of day. A judge gave the go-ahead for the bodycam footage to be made public earlier today, noting that a settlement had been reached between attorneys for Timberlake and the Sag Harbor Village Police Department in Long Island. In early March, Timberlake filed suit against Sag Harbor Village Police Department, Chief of Police Robert Drake and the Village of Sag Harbor to prevent the release of the footage, claiming that it would cause “severe and irreparable harm” to his reputation and “subject [him] to public ridicule and harassment.”. * ### ‘What Happens at Night’ First Look: Leonardo DiCaprio and Jennifer Lawrence Reunite in Martin Scorsese’s Marriage Horror Story.
recentArticles.summary: Justin Timberlake’s DWI Arrest Footage Released: ‘I’m a Little Nervous… My Heart Is Racing’ - Variety

recentArticles.title: Bruno Mars Signs Global Publishing Partnership With Avex Music Group - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Bruno Mars Signs Global Publishing Partnership With Avex Music Group. Bruno Mars has signed a global music publishing administration partnership with Avex Music Group. “Bruno Mars is one of the most culturally impactful songwriters of his generation,” **Katsumi Kuroiwa**, CEO of Avex Inc., said in a statement. **Brandon Silverstein**, CEO of Avex Music Group, added, “We are thrilled to welcome Bruno to Avex and look forward to supporting his incredible songs.”. The record debuted atop the Billboard 200, while lead single “I Just Might” rebounded to No. 1 on the Hot 100 in the same tracking week — the single, released Jan. 9, became Mars’ first to debut atop the chart. *The Romantic* arrived on the heels of two mega-hits for Mars: “Die With a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with Rosé. While speaking with *Billboard* in December for a cover conversation with Rosé, Mars teased that the pair have another song they worked on together. ### Bruno Mars Signs Global Publishing Partnership With Avex Music Group.
recentArticles.summary: Bruno Mars Signs Global Publishing Partnership With Avex Music Group - Billboard
